name: esgames-plugins
description: A curated collection of Claude Code plugins

plugins.name: journal
plugins.description: Conversational journaling assistant that interviews you about your day and saves a Markdown entry to documents/journal/

plugins.name: usability-report
plugins.description: Evaluates a target (URL, app, UI, or codebase) against Nielsen's 10 usability heuristics and generates a structured Markdown report with severity ratings and recommendations.

plugins.name: prioritize
plugins.description: Work prioritizer using a local MCP memory graph. Runs morning kickoff or mid-day triage based on today's graph state.

plugins.name: introspection
plugins.description: Reflective conversation partner that loads your journal history and priority graph to surface work patterns, stalled tasks, and recurring themes.

plugins.name: research
plugins.description: Iterative research assistant that dispatches subagents for broad overviews then user-directed deep dives, keeping the main context clean.

plugins.name: context-snapshot
plugins.description: Rebuilds current_context.txt from all available artifacts — journal entries, priority graph, usability reports, and research notes. Run after a break or when context has drifted.

plugins.name: one-on-one
plugins.description: Manage one-on-one conversation threads — capture topics to discuss with specific people and review them before each meeting.

plugins.name: standup
plugins.description: Generates a concise morning standup report (Yesterday / Today / Blockers) from your journal entries and priority graph.
